title: Senior Solutions Architect
description: Partner with mid-market e-commerce brands and digital marketplaces to design and implement Watchtower and Pulse rollouts. Experience with Shopify/BigCommerce, streaming pipelines, and incident response best practices required. Lead architecture workshops and proofs of concept.
signals: Growing solutions capacity to support larger implementations; signals active mid-market/marketplace focus

title: Partner Manager - Technology Alliances
description: Own and grow ISV partnerships (TinyETL, Shopify app partners, data tooling vendors). Structure co-marketing, integration roadmaps, and joint success metrics.
signals: Deepening technology partnerships; emphasis on TinyETL and commerce ecosystem

title: Developer Relations Engineer
description: Drive developer content, SDKs, and samples for Pulse and Watchtower. Build demos, improve API docs, and represent engineers in feedback loops. Familiarity with webhooks, OAuth apps, and CI/CD.
signals: Investment in developer experience and platform strategy
